notes: Recovered from inline Achievement field writes in AchievementList.GetAchievementList.
Field offsets are confirmed by Achievement..ctor/model order: attribute=0x10, internalName/name=0x18, requirements/reward=0x28, cost/flavor=0x38.
attribute is a UserAttribute enum value; CardData.requirements uses the same numeric IDs for achievement-gated card unlocks.
